title: senecio fastigiatus subsp. macounii
intro: Senecio fastigiatus subsp. macounii, also known as Bear's Head or Western Ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio fastigiatus subsp. macounii include treating various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, while also being used as a diuretic and expectorant. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
